title: Self-Levelers - Self-Leveling Floor Surfaces - Elite South Texas
content:
Self-Levelers
Self-Levelers are used to create a flat smooth surface over rough and irregular substrates, which may have undulation and/or surface deterioration. These self-levelers can be used as a finished floor or can be coated with other flooring finishes. They are comprised of either resinous or cementitious based materials.
Manufacturing Facilities
Loading Dock Platforms
Aircraft Hangars
Warehouses
Commercial Kitchens & Processing Areas
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for more details.
